mapper.sql: id, name, type, weight, volume, value, status, priority, sender_id, receiver_id, origin_location, dest_location, distance, task_id, create_time, assign_time, load_time, deliver_time, complete_time
mapper.select: select from goods order by create_time desc
select from goods where status = #{status} order by create_time desc
select from goods where type = #{type} order by create_time desc
select from goods where sender_id = #{senderId} order by create_time desc
select from goods where receiver_id = #{receiverId} order by create_time desc
select from goods where status = '待分配' order by priority desc, create_time asc
select from goods where status in ('待运输', '运输中') and (assign_time is null or load_time is null) order by create_time asc
mapper.insert: insert into goods (name, type, weight, volume, value, status, priority, sender_id, receiver_id, origin_location, dest_location, distance, task_id, create_time, assign_time, load_time, deliver_time, complete_time) values (#{name}, #{type}, #{weight}, #{volume}, #{value}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{originLocation}, #{destLocation}, #{distance}, #{taskId}, #{createTime}, #{assignTime}, #{loadTime}, #{deliverTime}, #{completeTime})

insert into goods
name, type, weight, volume, value, status, priority, sender_id, receiver_id, origin_location, dest_location, distance, task_id, create_time, assign_time, load_time, deliver_time, complete_time,
#{name}, #{type}, #{weight}, #{volume}, #{value}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{originLocation}, #{destLocation}, #{distance}, #{taskId}, #{createTime}, #{assignTime}, #{loadTime}, #{deliverTime}, #{completeTime},
mapper.update: update goods set name = #{name}, type = #{type}, weight = #{weight}, volume = #{volume}, value = #{value}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, sender_id = #{senderId}, receiver_id = #{receiverId}, origin_location = #{originLocation}, dest_location = #{destLocation}, distance = #{distance}, task_id = #{taskId}, create_time = #{createTime}, assign_time = #{assignTime}, load_time = #{loadTime}, deliver_time = #{deliverTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime} where id = #{id}
